text_required_if_type_is_text.name: text_required_if_type_is_text
text_required_if_type_is_text.value: CASE WHEN "message_part"."type" = 'text' THEN "message_part"."text" IS NOT NULL ELSE TRUE END

reasoning_text_required_if_type_is_reaso.name: reasoning_text_required_if_type_is_reasoning
reasoning_text_required_if_type_is_reaso.value: CASE WHEN "message_part"."type" = 'reasoning' THEN "message_part"."reasoning_text" IS NOT NULL ELSE TRUE END

tool_call_fields_required.name: tool_call_fields_required
tool_call_fields_required.value: CASE WHEN "message_part"."type" LIKE 'tool-%' THEN "message_part"."tool_call_id" IS NOT NULL AND "message_part"."tool_state" IS NOT NULL ELSE TRUE END

file_fields_required.name: file_fields_required
file_fields_required.value: CASE WHEN "message_part"."type" = 'file' THEN "message_part"."media_type" IS NOT NULL AND "message_part"."image_id" IS NOT NULL ELSE TRUE END

local_project_path_required.name: local_project_path_required
local_project_path_required.value: CASE WHEN "type" = 'local' THEN "path" IS NOT NULL ELSE TRUE END

story_owner_required.name: story_owner_required
story_owner_required.value: "story"."chat_id" IS NOT NULL OR ("story"."project_id" IS NOT NULL AND "story"."user_id" IS NOT NULL)
